heading: Advanced Examples
body:
The examples in this section use the `queryString` operator to query
for movie plots that contain the terms `captain`, `kirk`, and
`chess`. This examples shows how different grouping of the same search
terms using parentheses can result in different documents to be
included in the search results.

The queries also includes a [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to:

- Exclude all fields except `title`, `plot`, and `fullpath`

- Add a field named `score`
